summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing for ASR Enterprises iteration 19 features. All backend APIs (16/16) passed. Frontend testing verified all major new features. Key features tested: Pincode delivery check for Bihar districts, Order tracking page, Product sharing, Product sorting, Admin order deletion, Payment flow (COD/Razorpay), and navigation changes.
seed_data_creation: Multiple test orders created during testing (prefixed with TEST_) - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 19 features working correctly. Key features verified: 1) Pincode delivery check - Bihar pincodes return deliverable=true with district info, non-Bihar returns deliverable=false. 2) Order tracking page (/track-order) with order number and phone inputs working. 3) Product sharing with WhatsApp, Facebook, Email, Copy Link options in product detail modal. 4) Product sorting (Newest, Price Low/High, Name A-Z) working. 5) 'Goods once sold' notice removed from checkout. 6) Govt Schemes removed from navigation. 7) Book Now button changed to 'Solar Maintenance Service @ ₹1,500' linking to /shop. 8) Shop link opens in new tab (target='_blank'). 9) Admin order deletion working for pending/cancelled orders only. 10) Service category defaults to 'Solar Cleaning Service'.

backend_apis.POST /api/shop/orders (COD): PASSED - Creates order with COD payment
backend_apis.DELETE /api/shop/orders/{id}: PASSED - Deletes pending/cancelled orders, rejects others

homepage_navigation.govt_schemes_removed: PASSED - No Govt Schemes in navigation
homepage_navigation.book_now_button: PASSED - Links to /shop with 'Solar Maintenance Service @ ₹1,500' text

shop_page.pincode_check: PASSED - Input, button, and result display working
shop_page.product_sorting: PASSED - 4 sort options (Newest, Price Low/High, Name A-Z)
shop_page.category_filters: PASSED - 6 categories visible (Solar Panels, Inverters, Batteries, Solar Wire, Accessories, Services)
shop_page.share_buttons: PASSED - Share icons on product cards

product_detail_modal.share_options: PASSED - WhatsApp, Facebook, Email, Copy Link icons
product_detail_modal.related_products: INFO - Present in code, depends on category products

checkout_flow.payment_options: PASSED - Cash on Store (COD) and Pay Online (Razorpay) visible
checkout_flow.delivery_options: PASSED - Store Pickup and Home Delivery (Bihar Only) options

order_tracking_page.inputs: PASSED - Order number and phone inputs with data-testid
order_tracking_page.error_handling: PASSED - Shows error for invalid order

admin_shop_management.products_tab: PASSED - Shows products list with edit/delete
admin_shop_management.orders_tab: PASSED - Shows orders with status dropdown
admin_shop_management.order_delete_buttons: PASSED - Delete icons visible for pending/cancelled orders only
admin_shop_management.service_category_default: PASSED - Code confirms default is 'Solar Cleaning Service'
